title: Tests did not execute — import collection error in scoring environment
evidence: Prior evaluation shows pytest exit code 2: ERROR collecting test_books.py — importlib failed to import fastapi/sqlalchemy (dependencies not installed in scorer environment)
suggestion: Ensure scoring environment has fastapi, sqlalchemy, httpx installed before running pytest

title: Validation returns 422 instead of 400
evidence: main.py:20 — FastAPI/Pydantic returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for missing required fields; test_books.py:52 asserts 422
suggestion: 422 is correct per FastAPI conventions and RFC 4918; no change needed
